title: Tangy Chewy Portuguese Vegetable Stew
description: A hearty, vegetarian-friendly stew blending Portuguese and Cajun flavors, with a tangy twist from fermented ingredients. This cozy dish is perfect for a chilly evening.
instructions: Heat the olive oil in a large Dutch oven over medium heat.
Add the chopped onion and cook until translucent, about 5 minutes.
Add the minced garlic and cook for an additional 1-2 minutes, until fragrant.
Add the chopped carrots, potatoes, and zucchini, stirring to combine.
Sprinkle the cajun seasoning over the vegetables and stir to coat.
Pour in the fermented vegetable broth, bringing the mixture to a simmer.
Reduce the heat to low and let cook, covered, for 20-25 minutes, or until the vegetables are tender.
Stir in the chopped kale and cook until wilted, about 2-3 minutes.
Season the stew with lemon juice and serve hot.
